mechanism_narrative: Higher 3-month growth in industrial production signals improving real activity and earnings revisions, causing higher S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days; weaker 3-month growth produces lower returns.
evidence_refs: fact:INDPRO vintage value was available for 2020-03 at the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if higher 3-month INDPRO growth does not rank with higher 20-day S&P 500 returns: rolling 3-year Rank IC is less than or equal to 0 in two consecutive windows.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid rise in unemployment signals an abrupt deterioration in household income and credit risk, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days after the labor shock is observed.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by more than 0.3 percentage points over the prior 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:UNRATE vintage value for 2020-03 was 4.4 at the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations have positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or if their mean return is not below the unconditional mean at p <= 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate falls sharply while CPI inflation is not accelerating, lower discount rates dominate inflation risk and cause positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS 3-month change is below -0.75 percentage points and CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized change is at or below 2.5%
evidence_refs: fact:FEDFUNDS vintage value for 2020-03 was 0.65 at the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if the joint trigger does not produce a positive 60-day mean excess return versus non-triggered periods, or if the interaction term has nonpositive out-of-sample contribution.

mechanism_narrative: A large monthly decline in retail sales signals a sudden contraction in final demand and revenue expectations, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS 1-month percent change is less than -1.5%
evidence_refs: fact:RSAFS vintage value for 2020-03 was available at the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if triggered RSAFS declines are followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of observations or by mean returns above the sample baseline.

mechanism_narrative: Housing-starts strength signals durable-goods demand, construction activity, and easier household credit conditions, causing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST is above its prior 6-month moving average and its 3-month change is positive
evidence_refs: fact:HOUST vintage value for 2020-02 was 1599 at the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if active HOUST uptrends have a 60-day forward return hit rate at or below the unconditional hit rate and a nonpositive average return spread versus inactive periods.

mechanism_narrative: When payroll employment falls while real GDP is contracting, the economy has entered a broad downturn that reduces earnings expectations, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS 3-month change is negative and latest GDPC1 quarter-over-quarter growth is negative
evidence_refs: fact:PAYEMS and GDPC1 vintages were available before or on the decision date
regime_hint: confirmed recession or broad macro contraction
failure_condition: Reject if the joint payroll-GDP contraction trigger is not associated with lower 60-day returns than either single-series trigger alone in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: An emergency drop of the federal funds rate below 1% signals acute financial stress rather than normal stimulus, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS is below 1.0% and its 3-month change is less than -1.0 percentage points
evidence_refs: fact:FEDFUNDS vintage value for 2020-03 was 0.65 at the decision date
regime_hint: financial-stress easing at the effective lower bound
failure_condition: Reject if triggered emergency-easing observations have positive 5-day S&P 500 returns in more than 55% of cases or if average triggered returns exceed non-triggered returns.

mechanism_narrative: Falling industrial production combined with accelerating CPI inflation signals a stagflationary margin squeeze, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO 3-month change is below -1.0% and CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized change is above 3.0%
evidence_refs: fact:Both INDPRO and CPIAUCSL vintage observations were available at the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if the joint stagflation trigger has nonnegative mean 20-day returns or if adding CPIAUCSL acceleration to INDPRO decline does not improve out-of-sample loss.
